name: Hassani Dade
ai_summary: Hassani Dade from Georgia has daily experience with young children (1 and 3 years old) and demonstrates patience in chaotic situations. They are available full-time or part-time in Gilbert, AZ and use collaborative conflict resolution by bringing children together for conversation.
